name: awesome-deep-learning-papers-for-search-recommendation-advertising
description: Awesome Deep Learning papers for industrial Search, Recommendation and Advertisement. They focus on Embedding, Matching, Pre-Ranking, Ranking, Post Ranking, Relevance, LLM and RL. Please cite our paper "Deep Learning to Rank in Industrial Search Engines, Recommender Systems, and Online Advertising - An Overview and New Perspectives" (TOIS 2026).
